agent_type.description: Only monitor agents with these names/types

step_name.description: Glob pattern for workflow step names

model.description: Model ID or provider/model for classification calls

context.description: Context collector names. Built-in: tool_results, assistant_text, user_text, tool_calls, custom_messages, project_vision, project_conventions, git_status. Unknown collectors produce empty string.

excludes.description: Skip activation if these monitors already steered this turn

promptTemplate.description: Path to .md Nunjucks template file for classification prompt. Searched in .pi/monitors/, ~/.pi/agent/monitors/, then package examples/. Takes precedence over inline prompt.

prompt.description: Inline classification prompt with {placeholder} substitution. Used when promptTemplate is absent.

path.description: Path to patterns JSON file (relative to monitor dir)
Path to instructions JSON file (relative to monitor dir)

steer.description: Message to inject into conversation. Null = no steering.

path.description: JSON file to write findings to

schema.description: Schema the target file conforms to

merge.description: append = add to array, upsert = update by id

array_field.description: Which field in the target JSON holds the array (e.g. 'gaps', 'findings')

template.description: Template for mapping classification output to target schema. Use {description}, {severity}, {finding_id}, {monitor_name}, {timestamp} placeholders.

learn_pattern.description: If true, add new pattern to patterns file on 'new' verdict
